hooks.command: echo '📝 Reminder: If you made structural changes, update CLAUDE.md.'

hooks.prompt: Before finishing, if you wrote or edited code, run all checks: (1) Code Review — error handling, response format, code reuse. (2) Security — no SQL injection, no hardcoded secrets, auth on routes, no PII in logs. (3) SQL — parameterized queries, no SELECT *, indexes on WHERE columns, no N+1. (4) Performance — parallelize independent queries, pagination, no unnecessary re-renders. (5) Conventions — no console.log in production, input validation. Report issues with file:line. Skip if no code changed.
